case_title: DOMINIQUE CORLEY ET AL VS. AIRBNB INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-08-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFFS TO AUG-12-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DOMINIQUE CORLEY IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. PLAINTIFF MALAIKA MUVUNDAMINA IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT AIRBNB IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LAURNE RHOADES, LEGAL INTERN VIA ZOOM. PLAINTIFFS ARE APPEARING AS AN UNAUTHORIZED APPEARANCE. CASE CONTINUED TO ALLOW PLAINTIFFS TO SUBMIT TIMELY ZOOM APPEARANCE REQUESTS. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUVUNDAMINA, MALAIKA
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM(PLANTIFF)**GRANTED** MALAIKA MUVUNDAMINA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CORLEY, DOMINIQUE MUVUNDAMINA, MALAIKA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AIRBNB INC. $7,975.50 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,065.50, PARTIES APPEARED BY ZOOM THE COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFFS' CANCELATION OF THEIR TRIP FALLS WITHIN AIRBNB'S EXTENUATING CIRCUMSTANCES POLICY BY VIRTUE OF COVID INFECTION. THE COURT FURTHER FINDS THAT COMMUNCATING WITH BOTH AIRBNB AND THE HOST WAS CHALLENGING AND NOT EASILY AMENABLE TO EARLIER RESOLUTION, SUCH THAT REFUND NOW IS A FAIR RESULT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

PLAINTIFFS DOMINIQUE CORLEY AND MALAIKA MUVUNDAMINA ORALLY AGREED TO STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM, AND ORALLY AGREED FOR DEPARTMENT 506 COURTROOM CLERK TO SIGN THE STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER FORM ON THEIR BEHALF. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
